title: oreogrammitis graminella
intro: Oreogrammitis graminella, also known as the grass fern or grass spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis graminella include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
